description_long: This object is a vertically ribbed lotion dispenser set, featuring a cylindrical pump bottle, a matching cylindrical cup, and an oval tray. The pump bottle has a metallic gray pump mechanism and a light wood accent at the neck, while the cup has a similar wood accent at its base. The tray is oval with raised, ribbed sides and a smooth interior, designed to hold the other two items. The ribbed texture is consistent across all components, giving the set a modern, tactile appearance. The color palette is primarily white with light wood and metallic gray highlights. The set is likely made from a combination of plastic, wood, and metal, suitable for use in urban bathrooms or public washrooms.
description: A modern, ribbed white lotion dispenser set with a pump bottle, matching cup, and oval tray, accented with light wood and metallic gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pump bottle, cup, and tray side by side, highlighting the ribbed texture and wood accents.
description_view_1: Angled view with the pump bottle behind the cup and tray, emphasizing the metallic pump and the oval shape of the tray.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the alignment of the cup and pump bottle, with the tray visible in the background.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the back of the pump bottle and the tray, with the cup partially obscured.
